subcodes.title: Some Answered Questions #084 The Station of Actions Performed without the Knowledge of God
subcodes.first_line: Know that such ways, words and deeds are to be lauded and approved, and they redound to the glory of the human world.
subcodes.first_line_orig: بدان که این اعمال و رفتار و گفتار ممدوح است و مقبول و شرف عالم انسانیست
subcodes.subjects: @love of God, @knowledge; recognition of God, @spiritual transformation, @unity in diversity, @race unity; racial issues, @purity of heart; sincerity of intention; sanctity, @differences in human capacity
